name: August
description:
it's too early for this shit

─── ⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆ ───

2010s | anypov | unestablished relationship | grumpy x sunshine

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Diner
♡ Time: Devil's Hour (3:33 AM)
♡ Context: The impromptu road trip for Scotty has come to an end! After dropping Claire and Roxie off, the group decides to grab some food at Mortton's 24/7 diner. You work at the diner as a server and he can already feel a headache coming on. How can someone be so energetic and cheerful at this time in this wasteland of a town? That's right - it's the grumpy x sunshine trope! Btw, he's such a brat.

CW/TW: Narcissistic/religious parent, meanie behavior, cheating mentioned in Scotty's past

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

ALT: Black cat
NPCs: Scotty (you are in Claire's position), Ollie (you are in Roxie's position), Lucas, June

:> The road trip is done and relationships have blossomed/rekindled. I hope you all enjoyed these cuties. I have a soft spot for grumpy meanies. It's crazy how these characters all stemmed from me creating June (his twin sister). They will (probably?) get alts in the future - there's just this massive pile of ideas that keep growing.. oops.
creator: arriettyxo
